prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel, 62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) paired with a **custom BorgWarner EFR 8374 (0.92 A/R) exhaust housing** for the **2.5L TFSI DAZA engine**, supporting 650+ WHP on E85 with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** (dual-port, V-band) for precise boost control at 32+ psi.

Full **Motec M150 ECU standalone management** with **Bosch Motorsport 8-hole high-impedance injectors (2,200cc/min)** and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors (30-5280)** for closed-loop E85 flex-fuel tuning, paired with a **Plex Tuning Display (PDK-100)** for real-time data logging and boost-by-gear mapping.

Custom **APR Carbon Fiber intake manifold** with **102mm throttle body (ported & polished)** and **Ferrea Racing intake/exhaust valves (titanium retainers, Inconel springs)** for the **DAZA head**, paired with a **VRSF 7.5" intercooler (bar-and-plate, 3.5" inlet/outlet)** and **Samco Sport silicone hoses (4-ply, reinforced)** to eliminate heat soak at sustained 30+ psi boost.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave)** and **OEM+ bolt-on overfenders (Audi Sport homologated)** for a 30mm rear and 25mm front track increase, paired with **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (9.5x20 ET35 front, 11x20 ET25 rear)** in **Gunmetal with brushed lip** and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear)** for aggressive stance and grip.

**Full custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** with **dual 102mm carbon fiber tips (burnt titanium finish)**, **valved X-pipe (resonated, 3" diameter)**, and **secondary cat-delete (replaced with GESI 300-cell race cats)** for a deep, crackling 2.5L TFSI soundtrack, paired with a **custom valvetronic controller (iOS/Android app-controlled)** for on-demand backfire tuning.

**OEM+ RS3-style front bumper (S-Line conversion with carbon fiber splitter)** and **custom rear diffuser (3D-printed PETG, 50% larger than stock)** with **integrated Gurney flap (adjustable, 20mm height)** for downforce optimization, finished in **Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7Z) with matte clear coat** and **custom vinyl overlays (3M 2080 Gloss Black, 50% tint) on lower rockers and mirror caps**.
